content.full_text:
March 8, 2000

Henry C. Lozano
6067 Angel Drive
Winton, CA 95388

Re: Your Request for Assistance
Our File No. G-00-063

Dear Mr. Lozano:

Your letter requesting assistance was received by the Fair Political Practices Commission on March 6, 2000. The Fair Political Practices Commission solely has jurisdiction over the Political Reform Act (Government Code Sections 81000-91015). Consequently, we are unable to provide assistance with respect to the issues you raise in your letter.

For questions concerning Government Code Section 1090, we suggest that you contact the Office of the Attorney General.

Please feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660 if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Kelly L. Winsor
Legal Analyst
